---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new resource, operation, event, or quality-of-life improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like the node to do?

A clear description of the feature.

## Why?

What problem does this solve? Real workflow examples are very welcome.

## API support

Does the Voka public API already expose what's needed, or does the platform itself need a contract change?

- [ ] Already in [docs.vokaai.com/docs/api](https://docs.vokaai.com/docs/api/intro) — link the relevant endpoint:
- [ ] Needs a platform-side change first

## Alternatives considered

Workarounds you've already tried (HTTP Request node, custom code, etc.).
